data.body: Adversarial review: 3 findings (inline analysis), 0 rejected, 3 accepted. Applied: 0 new stories, 0 modified done definitions, 0 new dependencies, 3 new considerations. Findings: (1) file locking for concurrent cache writes → Story e040-3d27; (2) pre-dispatch credentials gate in brainstorm SKILL.md → Story b5e2-abd6; (3) roadmap theme vs feature context CQL compatibility → Story f8c4-2d3d.
